view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement that new bookings use the current bound version is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement that new bookings use the current bound version is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that new bookings are correctly associated with the current offer version, as indicated by the linked use case and the prior step evidence. Specifically, both bookings reference the same offer version ID, demonstrating that the system adheres to the requirement that new bookings utilize the current version while maintaining historical context for older bookings. This is further supported by the linked use case which explicitly states that new bookings use the current bound version.
